title: On Those That Hated "The Playboy Of The Western World"
content:
Once, when midnight smote the air,
Eunuchs ran through Hell and met
On every crowded street to stare
Upon great Juan riding by:
Even like these to rail and sweat
Staring upon his sinewy thigh.
meaning:
William Butler Yeats's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "On Those That Hated "The Playboy Of The Western World""...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
